paths.name: motion/react
paths.message: Page files must import motion via '@/components/motion/*' or '@/lib/motion/*', not 'motion/react' directly. See: openspec/changes/elevate-storefront-visual-experience/specs/motion-system/spec.md → 'Motion primitives live in one library'.

paths.name: framer-motion
paths.message: Framer Motion is replaced by 'motion'. Use '@/components/motion/*' primitives.
